prose.en: FedRAMP MAY require providers to delay significant changes beyond the standard Significant Change Notification period and/or submit significant changes for approval in advance as a condition of a formal FedRAMP Corrective Action Plan or other agreement.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: The circumstances and conditions of such a Corrective Action Plan will vary and be documented in the Correcive Action Plan.
